---

Moving is such a bitch 🤧 but loading is better than unloading so... not bad yet.

You guys... Helldivers 2 is so fun. I suck at shooters and I'm still a noob but it's sooo worth it tbh. And I want more ppl to game with (assuming that ppl are okay with a very infrequent schedule) so if you wanna play bg3, helldivers 2, or maybe there's something else that I might also have, lmk 🫶🏻 I won't be able to play until early December though.

Please review and let me know of anything I should fix or change! This dynamic was a bit hard to write without including everything from this scene so I tried to stick with just the first night/day in San Francisco.

Thank you guys for 111 followers! 💜🫶🏻
